title: Fastq data for SARS-CoV-2 Bristol isolate of England/2/2020 virus,  wild type and spike deletion variant datasets
author: Matthews DA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Fastq data for SARS-CoV-2 Bristol isolate of wild type and spike deletion variant 

 This virus was originally described in Davidson et al (2020)  https://doi.org/10.1186/s13073-020-00763-0  

 This is the England/2/2020 strain which was a mixed population that has been resolved into a pure wild type variant (passaged on human cells) and a pure deletion variant (passaged on VeroE6 cells) 

 The fastq files are from direct RNA sequencing on Oxford Nanopore using a Mk1 flow cell R9.4.1 and a direct RNA seq kit SQK-RNA0002.
